payload.answer: The new statement conflicts with the existing memory about whether Sam from Goldman has children. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: approve_supersession: Replace the existing memory that Sam from Goldman has two children with the new memory that Sam from Goldman has no children.
keep_both: Keep both statements because they may refer to different people, contexts, or time periods.
reject_new: Keep the existing memory that Sam from Goldman has two children and do not add the new statement.
edit: Modify the new or existing memory to clarify the intended meaning, timing, or identity of Sam from Goldman.
